name: Sticker Peel
description: Card corner peel effect that reacts to mouse proximity, with spring-interpolated peel size and configurable corner position.
accessibility_notes: peel is decorative — content behind should be accessible via other means

front.description: Content displayed on the front face

behind.description: Optional content revealed behind the peel

conflicts: peel requires precise mouse positioning — not usable on touch
overflow: hidden clips peel at container edge
usage_tip: Best for reveal interactions like coupons or hidden messages; desktop only.
